# Design Tutor Finder Website

This is a code bundle for Design Tutor Finder Website. The original project is available at https://www.figma.com/design/VvWXHk7Ve4OtvgZoZOv2mN/Design-Tutor-Picker-Website.

## Running the code

Run `npm i` to install the dependencies.

Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
